//: Self-improvement targets. Each improver agent defines WHAT it improves each cycle. The runner (scripts/self-improve.mjs) iterates these, asks an open-source model for a concrete patch, and opens a PR. Add targets here (or let the Agent Factory append them) to grow the ecosystem.
//models: Free OpenRouter open-source pool, ordered BIGGEST → smallest. The runner tries each in turn and only falls to a smaller model when the bigger one is unavailable (429) — best quality first, graceful degradation after.

targets.title: Investment Hub daily improvement
targets.instruction: Make ONE focused, safe improvement to the Investment Hub. Pick the single highest-value upgrade you can fully implement in a few files: clearer data viz, a useful new metric/column, better empty/loading/error states, accessibility, or a small UX refinement. Keep it consistent with the existing warm-white design system and current code style. Do NOT touch auth, trading execution, broker, or env. Edits must compile.

targets.title: German classes — grow the learning module
targets.instruction: Build or extend a German learning module at /dashboard/german (route + components under components/german + data under lib/german). If it does not exist yet, scaffold a minimal working lesson page (A1 vocab + a simple review flow) reusing the existing design tokens and PageShell. If it exists, add ONE lesson or feature (more vocab, a grammar card, a spaced-repetition tweak). Self-contained, client-side, no new deps, must compile.
